archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) - Mission Control / Data Journalism
description: A serious, data-dense smart city environmental intelligence platform. The design prioritizes operational clarity, high-contrast data visualization, and a 'mission control' aesthetic over generic SaaS patterns. It uses rigid grids, flat surfaces with sharp or minimal radii, and high-visibility data accents on a deep obsidian background.

typography.guidelines: Do not use Inter. Ensure all major KPIs and tabular data use the monospace font for alignment. Use tracking-tighter for large headings.

layout_patterns.grid_system: Mode B: Control Room Grid. Base grid of 12 columns (lg:grid-cols-12). Use tight spacing (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_patterns.container_spacing: Generous outer padding (p-6 or p-8) to frame the dashboard. Internal card padding should be dense (p-4 or p-5) to maximize data density.
layout_patterns.alignment: Strict left-alignment for data and metrics. Optical alignment for icons next to text.
layout_patterns.surfaces: Flat solid surfaces only. No glassmorphism in the main data view to avoid visual refraction of metrics. Borders should be crisp 1px solid.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-[#7F1D1D] text-white hover:bg-[#991B1B] rounded-sm px-4 py-2 transition-colors

badges.style: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-mono font-medium uppercase tracking-wider border

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-white/60 border-b border-white/10 pb-2

charts.tooltip: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/20 text-white rounded-sm shadow-xl
charts.lines: Use neon-like data lines (e.g., brand_accent or aqi colors) with high contrast against the dark background.

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use fast, crisp transitions (duration-150 or duration-200 ease-out). Avoid slow, floaty animations.
motion_and_interactions.data_loading: Use monospace ASCII art loaders or sharp skeleton screens (bg-white/5 animate-pulse).

images.description: Foggy morning scene with pedestrians near India Gate in New Delhi. Use with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80) to provide atmospheric context without sacrificing readability.
Drone shot capturing the dense urban sprawl of New Delhi. Useful for the Enforcement / Hotspot map background or secondary context.

media.icons_library: lucide-react (Use crisp, technical icons like Activity, Map, AlertTriangle, ShieldAlert, Wind, ActivitySquare)

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a 'Mission Control' style dashboard. Avoid standard SaaS layouts. The interface should feel data-dense and operational.
Incorporate a ward-level map component. If a real map library isn't feasible, build a high-fidelity interactive data visualization representing the map.
Implement the 'Hyperlocal Predictive AQI Forecasting' chart using Recharts. Show historical data, predicted forecast, and a persistence baseline. Display the RMSE metric prominently.
Build an 'Enforcement Recommendations' table. Include columns for Hotspot Location, Correlated Source (Permits, Industrial, Fleet), Priority Level, and Action button.
Create bilingual (English/Hindi) 'Citizen Health Risk Advisory' cards driven by Gemini 3 Flash mock data.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='forecast-tab-72h').
Do NOT use Inter font. Do NOT use purple gradients. Use sharp 1px borders, deep blacks, and monospace data typography.
